name: OSTIOMEATAL UNIT
definition: area of superomedial maxillary sinus + middle meatus as the common mucociliary drainage flattened conelike passage between inferomedial border of orbit / ethmoid bulla key bony structure in lateral nasal wall below hiatus semilunaris in middle meatus final segment for drainage of maxillary sinus; located just inferior to ethmoid bulla in
discriminating_features: located in cephalad recess of middle meatus

general: located in cephalad recess of middle meatus
